hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"tool_input\",{}).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "(^|/)claude/"; then MIRROR=$(echo "$FILE" | sed "s|/claude/|/codex/|"); echo ""; echo "[codex-mirror] WARNING: You edited a file under claude/:"; echo "  $FILE"; echo "  Check whether the same change is needed in codex/:"; echo "  $MIRROR"; echo ""; fi; exit 0'
